description: Style NoteIn a myriad of colours, prints and patterns, soft cotton T-shirts from french connection look as good as they feel. Up your glam quotient by wearing this graphic tee with a blazer for urban style. Product DetailsBlack t-shirt has a round neck, short sleeves, brand printed on the front and a brand tag appliqued above the right hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash with similar coloursIron on reverse sideSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
